customers.name: Chief Revenue Officer / VP Sales
customers.description: Executive owner of pipeline creation, forecast accuracy, quota attainment, and sales productivity across new business and expansion motions. Accountable for turning commercial effort into predictable revenue without adding disproportionate headcount.
careAbout: Predictable pipeline coverage by segment and region
Higher win rate and shorter sales cycle
Reliable forecast accuracy for board reporting
Rep productivity and time spent selling versus admin
Cross-functional SLA adherence from Marketing, Finance, Legal, and Security
Expansion revenue and reduced churn risk in the installed base
winsThem: A single commercial operating layer connecting leads, accounts, pricing, approvals, and forecast
Faster quote-to-close motion with fewer handoff delays
Deal inspection and pipeline risk alerts before quarter-end
Trustworthy data that reduces spreadsheet reconciliation
Clear attribution of revenue impact by channel, segment, and rep action
theirFear: Missing the quarter because the forecast was wrong
Top reps losing time to manual CRM and approval work
Discount leakage or contract delays eroding margin and credibility

jobsToBeDone.name: Run predictable pipeline-to-revenue execution
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Operate the full commercial funnel from lead intake to closed-won with enough control to forecast confidently and intervene early on risk.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Higher quota attainment, improved forecast accuracy, and faster conversion from qualified demand to booked revenue.

steps.description: Unify inbound, outbound, partner, and expansion opportunities into a common pipeline view.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Unified revenue data model
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Normalizes leads, accounts, contacts, opportunities, and territories into one source of truth.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Identity and account matching
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Deduplicates contacts and maps signals to the correct account and owner.

steps.description: Route demand to the right team based on segment, geography, product, and propensity to buy.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Rules-based routing engine
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Automatically assigns leads and opportunities according to commercial policy.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Propensity and deal scoring
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Ranks opportunities by expected value, urgency, and conversion probability.

steps.description: Move deals through qualification, discovery, proposal, security review, legal, and procurement with minimal friction.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Stage-gated workflow orchestration
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Triggers required steps, checklists, and approvals by deal type and amount.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Cross-functional approval workspace
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Coordinates pricing, legal, security, and finance approvals in one thread.

steps.description: Detect slipped deals, weak next steps, discount risk, and low-confidence commits before the quarter closes.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Forecasting and scenario planning
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Generates commit, best-case, and downside views by segment and team.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Pipeline risk intelligence
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Flags missing stakeholders, stalled stages, weak activity, and atypical discounting.

steps.description: Ensure accurate booking, clean order data, and structured transition into onboarding and customer success.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Order-to-booking integration
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Pushes approved commercial terms into billing, ERP, and implementation systems.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Structured handoff package
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Transfers scope, stakeholders, risks, and success criteria to downstream teams.

jobsToBeDone.name: Increase sales productivity without linear headcount growth
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Reduce non-selling work, standardize repetitive tasks, and improve rep effectiveness through embedded automation and guided selling.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: More pipeline and bookings per rep, lower ramp time, and improved gross margin on commercial operations.

steps.description: Measure where reps and managers spend time on CRM hygiene, pricing, approvals, and reporting.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Workflow telemetry
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Tracks time spent, step latency, and manual touches across the commercial process.

steps.description: Pre-fill records, generate quotes, summarize calls, and draft follow-ups from activity signals.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: AI copilot for sales execution
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Produces summaries, next-step suggestions, and first-draft content inside the workflow.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Quote and proposal automation
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Creates compliant quotes and proposal packs from approved catalog and pricing rules.

steps.description: Equip leaders with structured deal inspection and rep coaching views.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Manager operating dashboard
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Surfaces deal health, rep activity quality, and forecast variance at team level.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Playbook recommendation engine
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Suggests coaching actions based on historical win patterns and current deal context.

steps.description: Link automation usage to pipeline creation, conversion, sales cycle, and attainment outcomes.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Causal performance analytics
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Connects usage, behavior changes, and business outcomes with cohort-based analysis.

top.name: Net New Revenue Attainment
top.description: Percentage of committed new and expansion revenue achieved in-period.

children.name: Qualified Pipeline Coverage
children.description: Value of qualified pipeline relative to upcoming period quota.

children.name: Lead-to-SQL Conversion
children.description: Percentage of leads converted to sales qualified opportunities.

children.name: SQL Acceptance Time
children.description: Median time for sales to accept and act on a qualified lead.

children.name: Pipeline Hygiene Score
children.description: Share of active opportunities with complete data, next step, close plan, and decision criteria.

children.name: Missing Critical Fields
children.description: Percentage of opportunities missing mandatory forecasting or qualification data.

children.name: Win Rate
children.description: Percentage of qualified opportunities closed-won.

children.name: Stakeholder Coverage
children.description: Average number of validated buying roles engaged per deal.

children.name: Proposal-to-Close Rate
children.description: Percentage of proposals that become closed-won bookings.

children.name: Sales Cycle Time
children.description: Median days from opportunity creation to booking.

children.name: Approval Turnaround
children.description: Median time for pricing, legal, and security approvals.

children.name: Forecast Accuracy
children.description: Variance between committed forecast and actual closed revenue.

children.name: Late-Stage Slip Rate
children.description: Percentage of commit-stage deals that slip out of period.

top.name: Annual Platform Value Realized
top.description: Total annualized economic value delivered by the platform through revenue uplift, productivity gains, and cost avoidance.

children.name: Commercial Module Penetration
children.description: Share of revenue teams adopting forecasting, approvals, and guided selling modules.

children.name: Paid Feature Attach Rate
children.description: Rate of adoption of premium AI and analytics packs within commercial teams.

children.name: Workflow Stickiness
children.description: Percentage of weekly active users executing core revenue workflows in-platform.

children.name: Cross-Function Dependency Coverage
children.description: Share of deals that complete approvals and handoffs fully inside the platform.

children.name: Chargeback and Savings Recovery
children.description: Annual budget captured through internal chargeback and replaced point-solution spend.

children.name: Displaced SaaS Spend
children.description: Annualized spend avoided by consolidating commercial tooling onto the platform.

children.name: AI Automation Premium
children.description: Annual internal premium allocated for advanced automation and intelligence features.

productStrategy.vision: Become the commercial operating system that makes revenue execution predictable, faster, and more scalable than headcount growth.

1_year.focus: Stabilize core revenue workflows and establish trusted commercial data.

revenueStreams: Internal chargeback to sales and revenue operations
Displaced CRM add-on and CPQ tooling spend
Premium analytics and AI automation package

milestones: Launch unified pipeline and forecast workspace
Deploy pricing, legal, and security approval orchestration
Release rep productivity telemetry and manager deal inspection
Integrate bookings handoff into billing and onboarding systems

3_year.focus: Scale commercial productivity and optimize conversion through automation and insight.

revenueStreams: Advanced AI copilot add-on
Revenue intelligence and scenario planning package
Partner and channel workflow module
supporting: Incremental revenue uplift attributable to platform

milestones: Introduce deal risk prediction and guided action recommendations
Add channel and partner revenue motion support
Automate quote-to-order workflows for standard deal classes
Establish benchmark library for win patterns by segment and product

5_year.focus: Evolve into an ecosystem-grade revenue platform spanning customers, partners, and financial controls.

revenueStreams: Transaction-based partner workflow fees
Embedded pricing intelligence and monetization services
Externalized revenue operations APIs and data products
supporting: Gross margin from consolidated tooling and automation

milestones: Expose revenue workflow APIs to partners and acquired entities
Enable autonomous low-risk deal progression and exception handling
Launch benchmark and pricing data products across business units
Create closed-loop revenue planning across sales, finance, and product

customers.name: Chief Marketing Officer / VP Marketing
customers.description: Executive accountable for pipeline generation, brand equity, demand efficiency, and marketing-attributed revenue. Owns budget allocation across channels and must prove ROI while aligning tightly with Sales on revenue outcomes.
careAbout: Marketing-sourced and influenced pipeline
Cost per qualified opportunity
Conversion from MQL to closed-won revenue
Attribution clarity across channels and campaigns
Brand consistency and performance across segments
Alignment with Sales on definitions and SLAs
winsThem: Closed-loop attribution tied directly to revenue outcomes
Real-time visibility into campaign performance and pipeline impact
Automated lead qualification and routing with SLA tracking
Experimentation infrastructure for rapid channel testing
Clear ROI reporting for board and executive reviews
theirFear: Marketing being seen as a cost center rather than a revenue engine
Inflated MQL numbers with low sales conversion
Budget cuts due to unclear ROI or attribution gaps

jobsToBeDone.name: Generate predictable qualified demand
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Plan, execute, and optimize multi-channel campaigns that convert target audiences into sales-accepted pipeline.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Higher marketing-sourced pipeline, lower cost per SQL, and improved conversion to revenue.

steps.description: Identify priority accounts, buyer personas, and value propositions by segment.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: ICP modeling and segmentation
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Analyzes historical win data and firmographics to define high-conversion segments.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Audience management layer
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Creates dynamic audience cohorts across CRM, product, and web data.

steps.description: Execute campaigns across paid, owned, earned, and partner channels.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Campaign orchestration workflow
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Coordinates content, channel timing, budget allocation, and approvals.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Multi-channel attribution system
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Tracks touchpoints across channels and ties them to pipeline creation.

steps.description: Score engagement, apply qualification rules, and hand off leads to Sales with SLA tracking.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Lead scoring engine
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Combines behavioral and firmographic signals into qualification scores.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: SLA tracking and routing
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Ensures timely sales follow-up and monitors acceptance rates.

steps.description: Analyze performance by campaign, channel, and segment to reallocate budget dynamically.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Revenue-linked ROI analytics
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Connects campaign spend to closed-won revenue and payback period.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Experimentation framework
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Enables A/B testing and incremental lift measurement across channels.

jobsToBeDone.name: Build and sustain brand equity
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Maintain consistent messaging, positioning, and engagement that increases long-term demand and market perception.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Higher inbound volume, stronger win rates, and improved pricing power.

steps.description: Ensure consistent narrative across campaigns, sales enablement, and product marketing.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Messaging governance hub
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Centralizes brand guidelines, messaging pillars, and content approvals.

steps.description: Track brand mentions, engagement metrics, and sentiment across channels.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Brand sentiment analytics
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Aggregates social, web, and campaign engagement data into brand health indicators.

steps.description: Correlate brand engagement and awareness metrics with pipeline and win rate improvements.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Brand-to-revenue attribution
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Links long-term engagement signals to revenue lift and pricing resilience.

top.name: Marketing-Sourced Pipeline
top.description: Total qualified pipeline value directly attributable to marketing activities.

children.name: Cost per SQL
children.description: Average marketing spend required to generate one sales-qualified lead.

children.name: Cost per Lead
children.description: Average cost to acquire a marketing lead.

children.name: MQL to SQL Rate
children.description: Percentage of marketing-qualified leads accepted by sales.

children.name: SQL to Win Rate
children.description: Percentage of sales-qualified leads that close-won.

children.name: Marketing ROI
children.description: Revenue generated divided by marketing spend.

children.name: Payback Duration
children.description: Time required to recover campaign spend from revenue.

top.name: Annual Platform Value Realized
top.description: Economic value created through improved pipeline generation, attribution clarity, and marketing efficiency.

children.name: Campaign Workflow Adoption
children.description: Percentage of campaigns executed fully through platform workflows.

children.name: Attribution Coverage
children.description: Share of revenue with multi-touch attribution captured.

children.name: MarTech Stack Savings
children.description: Annual savings from consolidating marketing tools and attribution systems.

children.name: AI Personalization Premium
children.description: Annual internal allocation for advanced targeting and personalization modules.

children.name: Channel Expansion Rate
children.description: Number of new channels or segments activated using platform templates.

children.name: Experiment Velocity
children.description: Number of controlled experiments launched per quarter.

productStrategy.vision: Become the revenue-aligned marketing operating system that ties brand, demand, and experimentation directly to closed-won outcomes.

1_year.focus: Establish closed-loop attribution and reliable demand tracking.

revenueStreams: Internal marketing platform allocation
MarTech consolidation savings
Attribution and analytics premium module

revenueStreams: AI personalization and predictive scoring module

supporting: Revenue lift attributable to targeting improvements

milestones: Launch predictive audience expansion models
Implement real-time budget reallocation engine
Connect brand engagement metrics to win-rate analytics
Enable cross-channel personalization at scale

revenueStreams: Usage-based campaign optimization services
Externalized audience and attribution APIs
Benchmarking and industry performance data products

milestones: Enable autonomous campaign optimization with guardrails
Launch marketing intelligence benchmarks across business units
Expose audience and attribution APIs to partners
Integrate product usage signals into dynamic demand orchestration

customers.name: Head of Customer Support / Customer Operations
customers.description: Leader accountable for case resolution quality, response times, cost-to-serve, escalations, and retention risk signals across customer-facing service operations.
careAbout: Fast and consistent customer issue resolution
Lower cost per ticket without degrading CSAT
Early detection of churn and escalation risk
Agent productivity and knowledge reuse
Cross-team collaboration with Product, Engineering, Billing, and Success
Operational visibility by channel, segment, and issue type
winsThem: One service workspace unifying tickets, customer history, billing, incidents, and product usage
Knowledge capture that improves every resolution
Automation for repetitive triage and standard requests
Escalation workflows with accountable SLAs
Actionable insights linking support patterns to retention and product quality
theirFear: Escalations going viral internally or externally because support missed severity
Rising ticket volume forcing expensive headcount growth
Churn driven by unresolved root causes hidden behind closed tickets

jobsToBeDone.name: Resolve customer issues quickly and correctly
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Run intake, triage, diagnosis, collaboration, and resolution in a way that minimizes repeat contacts and protects customer trust.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Higher CSAT, lower time-to-resolution, lower cost per case, and fewer escalations.

steps.description: Ingest customer contacts across email, chat, portal, and phone and classify urgency, product area, and issue type.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Omnichannel case intake
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Brings all support channels into a single queue and customer record.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: AI-assisted triage and classification
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Predicts intent, priority, language, and probable resolver group.

steps.description: Surface account health, entitlement, product usage, prior tickets, billing status, and incident context before first response.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Unified customer timeline
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Aggregates account events, transactions, support history, and product telemetry.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Entitlement and SLA engine
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Applies support terms, escalation thresholds, and response commitments automatically.

steps.description: Guide agents through known fixes and coordinate with engineering, billing, or customer success when needed.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Knowledge and runbook system
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Suggests relevant articles, diagnostics, and resolution steps based on case context.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Cross-functional swarm workspace
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Creates structured collaboration with owners, SLAs, and status tracking for escalations.

steps.description: Deliver the solution, confirm customer acceptance, and document the root cause and reusable knowledge.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Resolution automation
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Executes standard actions such as password resets, refunds, credits, and access changes.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Root cause capture
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Structures issue taxonomy and post-resolution learning for analytics and prevention.

jobsToBeDone.name: Reduce service cost while improving retention signals
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Lower avoidable support demand, automate routine work, and convert service data into product and customer health actions.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Lower cost-to-serve, fewer repeat contacts, improved retention, and better prioritization of product fixes.

steps.description: Find the issues generating the most cost, repeat contacts, and customer frustration.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Issue pattern analytics
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Clusters case themes and quantifies impact by product, segment, and channel.

steps.description: Move repetitive requests to self-service or automated resolution safely.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Self-service portal and bot orchestration
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Resolves common requests without agent intervention while preserving escalation paths.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Policy-aware workflow automation
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Automates refunds, entitlement checks, and account updates within approved thresholds.

steps.step: Feed insights back into the business
steps.description: Route root causes to Product, Billing, and Success and tie support trends to churn risk.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Closed-loop insight routing
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Creates prioritized feedback items and owner accountability across functions.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Retention risk scoring
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Combines service burden with product and account signals to flag churn risk.

top.name: Customer Retention Protected by Service
top.description: Revenue retained by resolving service issues effectively and preventing avoidable churn.

children.name: First Contact Resolution
children.description: Percentage of cases solved without follow-up contact or reopen.

children.name: Knowledge Match Rate
children.description: Percentage of cases where relevant knowledge is surfaced and used.

children.name: Reopen Rate
children.description: Percentage of resolved cases reopened by the customer or agent.

children.name: Root Cause Captured Rate
children.description: Share of resolved cases with structured root cause and fix classification.

children.name: Time to First Response
children.description: Median time from case creation to first meaningful response.

children.name: Triage Latency
children.description: Median time for classification and queue assignment.

children.name: Time to Resolution
children.description: Median elapsed time from ticket creation to customer-confirmed resolution.

children.name: Escalation Handoff Delay
children.description: Median time lost when transferring to another team.

children.name: Cost per Resolved Ticket
children.description: Fully loaded support cost divided by resolved tickets.

children.name: Automation Resolution Rate
children.description: Percentage of incoming requests resolved via self-service or automation.

top.name: Annual Platform Value Realized
top.description: Economic value created through lower service costs, retained revenue, and tooling consolidation.

children.name: Core Service Workflow Penetration
children.description: Share of service tickets and escalations handled end-to-end on the platform.

children.name: Agent Weekly Active Rate
children.description: Percentage of licensed agents active weekly in core workflows.

children.name: Support Stack Consolidation Savings
children.description: Annual spend avoided by replacing or reducing fragmented service tools.

children.name: AI Automation Premium
children.description: Annual internal allocation for advanced automation and knowledge intelligence.

children.name: Workflow Stickiness
children.description: Dependence of service operations on the platform as the system of action.

children.name: Knowledge Contribution Rate
children.description: Share of resolved cases adding reusable knowledge back to the platform.

productStrategy.vision: Become the enterprise service control tower that resolves issues faster, learns from every interaction, and converts support into a retention and product-quality engine.

Retired helpdesk and knowledge tooling spend

customers.name: CFO / Legal, Compliance and Security Leadership
customers.description: Combined economic buyer group responsible for cash control, auditability, contractual exposure, regulatory compliance, and enterprise risk posture. They succeed when the company scales without margin leakage, control failure, or compliance incidents.
careAbout: Financial controls and clean audit trails
Faster but policy-compliant approvals and contract execution
Lower regulatory, security, and contractual exposure
Visibility into policy exceptions and unresolved risks
Predictable close, procurement, and spend governance
Demonstrable compliance with customers, auditors, and regulators
winsThem: Embedded controls in the workflow instead of after-the-fact policing
Evidence collection and audit readiness by design
Policy-aware automation that accelerates low-risk work and isolates exceptions
A single view of obligations, approvals, and control breaches
Clear reduction in risk-adjusted cost of operations
theirFear: A material control failure, breach, or regulatory violation
Contractual commitments signed without approved terms or security review
Quarter-end surprises caused by manual reconciliations and hidden exceptions

jobsToBeDone.name: Enforce policy while keeping the business moving
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Build approval and control mechanisms directly into commercial, procurement, access, and financial workflows so the company can move fast without uncontrolled risk.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Lower exposure, faster compliant approvals, and fewer manual control activities.

steps.description: Encode approval thresholds, contract clauses, segregation-of-duties, spend rules, and security requirements.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Policy rules engine
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Transforms policy statements into executable workflow rules and decision thresholds.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Role and entitlement model
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Applies separation-of-duties, delegated authority, and least-privilege standards.

steps.description: Trigger the right approvals, reviews, and evidence requirements automatically based on transaction context.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Contextual approval orchestration
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Routes transactions to Finance, Legal, Security, or Compliance only when policy requires it.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Exception management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Documents deviations, compensating controls, owners, and expiry dates.

steps.description: Capture approvals, artifacts, logs, and policy decisions in a structured, immutable record.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Control evidence ledger
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Stores timestamps, approvers, versions, supporting files, and decision rationale.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Document and clause intelligence
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Extracts key obligations, terms, and missing artifacts from contracts and policies.

steps.description: Identify overdue reviews, repeated exceptions, control breaches, and high-risk concentrations and assign remediation.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Risk monitoring dashboard
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Aggregates exposures, overdue actions, and trends by function, geography, and process.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Remediation workflow management
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Tracks corrective actions, owners, due dates, and evidence of closure.

jobsToBeDone.name: Close the books and prove control effectiveness with less manual effort
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Reduce the time and risk involved in month-end, quarter-end, audits, and compliance reviews by standardizing data, approvals, reconciliations, and evidence collection.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Shorter close cycles, lower audit cost, fewer findings, and greater trust in reported numbers.

steps.description: Pull transactions, adjustments, approvals, contracts, and exceptions into one control view.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Cross-system control data pipeline
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Combines ERP, HRIS, CRM, ticketing, and contract records for reconciliation and testing.

steps.description: Perform recurring checks on approvals, access, spend, revenue recognition prerequisites, and contract adherence.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Automated controls testing
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Runs repeatable tests and flags failures or anomalies for review.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Anomaly detection
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Finds unusual transactions, patterns, or combinations that merit investigation.

steps.description: Produce traceable evidence packs for auditors, customers, and compliance requests without manual hunting.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Audit pack generator
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Compiles evidence, control results, approvals, and exceptions into review-ready outputs.

top.name: Risk-Adjusted Operating Margin
top.description: Operating margin after accounting for control failures, compliance cost, losses, and leakage prevented.

children.name: Automated Control Pass Rate

children.description: Share of controlled workflows with complete required evidence attached.

children.name: Audit Finding Rate

children.name: Remediation Closure Time

children.description: Number of functions using the common policy, approval, and evidence framework.

children.name: Premium Risk Analytics Attach Rate

customers.name: Chief Product Officer / CTO / Head of IT

careAbout: Faster delivery without lower quality or more incidents
Lower tooling fragmentation and integration burden
Reliable shared data, services, and developer experience
Visibility into portfolio trade-offs and engineering throughput
Scalable architecture that supports future business complexity
Secure and compliant internal systems with manageable operational load
winsThem: A platform layer that standardizes workflows, identity, data, and automation across teams
Shared services that remove repeated one-off engineering effort
Operational telemetry tied to portfolio and business outcomes
Self-service integrations and internal developer platform capabilities
Clear evidence that platform investment reduces cycle time and incident burden
theirFear: Platform sprawl where every team reinvents the same workflow and data logic
Delivery slowing because dependencies, approvals, and environments are unmanaged
Reliability or security incidents caused by inconsistent engineering standards

jobsToBeDone.name: Increase delivery throughput while controlling architectural complexity
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Provide shared workflows, integration patterns, and developer tooling that help teams ship faster with less duplication and fewer production issues.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Shorter lead time for change, better engineering leverage, lower integration overhead, and more predictable delivery.

steps.description: Define common services for identity, events, workflow, audit, notifications, and data access.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Shared platform services
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Offers reusable primitives so product teams avoid rebuilding common capabilities.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: API and event gateway
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Standardizes service contracts, discovery, authentication, and event routing.

steps.description: Let teams provision environments, integrations, roles, and workflow templates without ticket-heavy bottlenecks.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Internal developer portal
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Provides service catalogs, templates, runbooks, and environment automation.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Workflow template library
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Accelerates common internal process design with approved reusable patterns.

steps.description: Track delivery bottlenecks, incident patterns, and system health across product and internal operations.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Engineering flow analytics
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Measures cycle time, deployment frequency, queue delays, and dependency impact.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Operational observability layer
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Connects workflow execution, service health, and customer impact signals.

steps.description: Enforce architecture, security, data, and release guardrails while allowing controlled exceptions.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Policy-as-code guardrails
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Applies deployment, access, data, and workflow standards automatically.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Technical exception registry
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Tracks deviations, owners, expiry, and remediation plans.

jobsToBeDone.name: Reduce internal systems fragmentation and support load
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Consolidate duplicative tools, simplify integrations, and create one enterprise action layer for employees and teams.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Lower total cost of ownership, less IT support burden, and higher internal adoption of standardized workflows.

steps.description: Identify duplicate tools, broken handoffs, local spreadsheets, and shadow workflows.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: System and workflow inventory
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Creates visibility into tool overlap, integration debt, and manual workarounds.

steps.description: Choose the highest-value workflows and tools to absorb into the platform.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Value and dependency modeling
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Quantifies savings, risk, and migration dependency for each consolidation move.

steps.description: Rebuild or wrap fragmented processes using platform services and common identity, data, and workflow rules.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Integration adapters and migration toolkit
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Accelerates migration from legacy tools while preserving continuity.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Unified employee workspace
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Gives end users a consistent action layer across departments and use cases.

top.name: Technology Return on Platform Investment
top.description: Economic value delivered through faster delivery, lower tooling cost, and improved reliability from platform adoption.

children.name: Lead Time for Change
children.description: Median time from approved work start to production release.

children.name: Dependency Wait Time
children.description: Median time teams wait on cross-team dependencies or approvals.

children.name: Self-Service Provisioning Rate
children.description: Percentage of common engineering and IT requests completed without manual ticket fulfillment.

children.name: Template Reuse Rate
children.description: Share of new workflows or services launched from approved templates.

children.name: Change Failure Rate
children.description: Percentage of changes causing incident, rollback, or hotfix.

children.name: Guardrail Compliance Rate
children.description: Percentage of deployments and workflows passing policy checks automatically.

children.name: Mean Time to Restore
children.description: Median time to restore service after incident detection.

children.name: Observability Coverage
children.description: Share of critical services and workflows with complete telemetry and alerting.

children.name: Tooling Cost per Employee
children.description: Total internal systems and engineering tooling spend divided by active employees.

children.name: Duplicate Tool Count
children.description: Number of overlapping tools serving the same primary workflow category.

top.name: Annual Platform Value Realized
top.description: Economic value from engineering leverage, internal systems consolidation, and reduced operational incidents.

children.name: Shared Service Adoption
children.description: Number and share of teams building on core platform services rather than bespoke components.

children.name: Workflow Template Consumption
children.description: Count of workflows launched from reusable platform templates.

children.name: Consolidation Savings
children.description: Annual spend avoided by retiring duplicate internal tools and reducing integration maintenance.

children.name: Internal Platform Allocation
children.description: Annual budget captured from engineering, IT, and operations for platform services.

children.name: API and Service Attach Rate
children.description: Average number of platform services consumed per adopting team.

children.name: Premium Platform Capability Attach Rate
children.description: Rate of adoption of advanced observability, automation, and AI developer tools.

productStrategy.vision: Become the enterprise action and developer platform that standardizes how internal work is built, run, governed, and improved across business functions.

Retired tooling and integration spend

Stand up API gateway, workflow engine, and audit primitives

Advanced observability and incident intelligence

customers.name: CEO / Founders / Board / Investors
customers.description: Ultimate economic owners responsible for enterprise growth, operating leverage, risk posture, capital efficiency, and strategic optionality. They care less about individual workflows and more about whether the operating model compounds value as the business scales.
careAbout: Sustainable revenue growth with improving operating leverage
Management visibility grounded in trusted metrics rather than anecdotes
Strategic agility to enter markets, integrate acquisitions, and launch new products faster
Lower key-person risk and better organizational execution
Risk-adjusted enterprise value creation
A credible operating story for board, lenders, and future investors
winsThem: A platform that turns fragmented functions into one measurable operating system
Cross-functional data that makes trade-offs visible early
Faster scaling without linear growth in overhead
Auditability and resilience that protect valuation
Evidence that platform investments create compounding advantages over point solutions
theirFear: Growth stalling because the company cannot operationalize complexity
Margin compression from duplicated tools, manual work, and coordination drag
A preventable control, security, or execution failure damaging valuation and trust

jobsToBeDone.name: Run the enterprise with one operating truth
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Create an executive-level control plane that unifies revenue, service, financial, risk, and delivery signals into actionable views and decision mechanisms.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Better capital allocation, faster strategic decisions, improved accountability, and reduced management blind spots.

steps.description: Define shared metric definitions, ownership, and source systems across major functions.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Cross-domain semantic model
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Links revenue, support, finance, product, and risk data into consistent dimensions.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Scenario planning engine

steps.description: Turn board-level priorities into cross-functional initiatives with milestone tracking and leading indicators.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Strategic initiative orchestration
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Links goals, workstreams, owners, dependencies, and KPI movement.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Exception and escalation routing
capabilitiesNeeded.how_it_supports: Escalates material deviations, threshold breaches, and unresolved blockers to the right leaders.

jobsToBeDone.name: Increase enterprise value through operating leverage
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Use the platform to reduce coordination costs, consolidate tooling, improve decision quality, and build strategic assets that compound over time.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Improved EBITDA potential, stronger valuation multiples, and higher confidence in scaling or exit readiness.

steps.description: Quantify where growth uplift, cost reduction, risk avoidance, and speed advantages are available.

capabilitiesNeeded.name: Enterprise value decomposition

steps.description: Allocate platform investment to the workflows and capabilities with best cross-functional return.

top.name: Enterprise Value Creation Rate
top.description: Annual increase in enterprise value driven by growth, margin improvement, risk reduction, and strategic option value.

children.name: Efficient Growth Rate
children.description: Revenue growth adjusted for gross margin and customer acquisition efficiency.

children.name: Net Revenue Retention

children.name: Payback Period
children.description: Time required to recover sales and marketing acquisition cost.

children.name: Revenue per Employee
children.description: Revenue generated divided by average full-time equivalent count.

children.name: G&A Cost Ratio
children.description: General and administrative spend as a percentage of revenue.

children.name: Workflow Automation Rate
children.description: Share of high-volume internal workflows executed with automation.

children.name: Material Incident Frequency

children.name: Control Coverage
children.description: Share of critical workflows operating under measurable controls and evidence.

children.name: Function Penetration
children.description: Number and share of enterprise functions running priority workflows on the platform.

children.name: Workflow Breadth
children.description: Count of high-value workflows migrated to or built on the platform.

children.name: Budget Capture and Savings Recovery
children.description: Net annual budget captured through chargeback and savings reclaimed from redundant tools and manual effort.

children.name: Strategic Asset Monetization Readiness
children.description: Portion of platform capabilities ready for external API, partner, or subsidiary monetization.

children.name: Executive Dependency Index
children.description: Degree to which company planning, reporting, and intervention mechanisms depend on platform metrics and workflows.

children.name: Board Reporting Automation Rate
children.description: Share of board and leadership reporting generated directly from governed platform data.
